title: skimmia japonica var. orthoclada
intro: Skimmia japonica var. orthoclada is a lesser-known variety of the Skimmia japonica plant, a flowering evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. It is often used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing stress and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. Skimmia japonica var. orthoclada can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
